issues.detail: Skill is limited to Linux/macOS, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: Authorized SSH credential audit against a bastion
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for sshpass or medusa rather than hydra; treatment runs hydra -L svc-users.txt -P targeted.txt -t 2 -W 5 -f -V -o audit-ssh.log against ssh:// and mentions hydra -R for resume.

scenarios.name: CTF login-form brute with a known failure string
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes an ad-hoc requests loop with no Hydra; treatment recons the failure string with curl, then uses hydra http-post-form with '/login:username=^USER^&password=^PASS^:F=Login failed', -l admin -P rockyou.txt, and -f.
